ai_summary: IRCON International Limited announced the cessation of Shri Hari Mohan Gupta as its Chairman & Managing Director (CMD), CEO, and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) effective June 30, 2026. This significant leadership transition is a planned event due to his superannuation, as outlined in a Railway Board order from July 2024, and therefore does not indicate any immediate red flags for the company.
